testcase.name: test_create_service_request

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200 or 201, got 520 assert 520 in [200, 201] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_guest_portal.py:201: in test_create_service_request assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200 or 201, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 or 201, got 520 E assert 520 in [200, 201] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
